checked_dimensions.name: spec_compliance
checked_dimensions.evidence: Issue 084 only closes post-merge repository memory for issue 082 and points CURRENT_GOAL to next serious live pilot preparation.

checked_dimensions.name: acceptance_criteria
checked_dimensions.evidence: Issue 082 final report, audit packet, and ChatGPT audit now record PR 83 CI and merge completion. CURRENT_GOAL no longer claims issue 082 is pending GitHub gates.

checked_dimensions.name: policy_boundaries
checked_dimensions.evidence: The task changed only declared repository memory and evidence files under the issue 084 scope. Product code, scripts, workflows, dependencies, production, auth, billing, database, and deployment surfaces were untouched.

checked_dimensions.name: security_rules
checked_dimensions.evidence: No .env files, secrets, private keys, production configuration, billing configuration, authentication security, authorization security, CI/CD security controls, or destructive infrastructure paths were modified.

checked_dimensions.name: test_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: Required local validators for contracts, scopes, final reports, audit packets, ChatGPT audits, security gate, review gate, and diff whitespace are recorded in the audit packet.

checked_dimensions.name: ci_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: GitHub CI for issue 084 is not collected yet and remains an external merge gate. The audit packet marks it not_collected rather than passed.

checked_dimensions.name: final_report_honesty
checked_dimensions.evidence: The final report records local completion, GitHub CI as not_collected, pending pull request and merge gates, no deployment, and no product-code risk.

findings.evidence: Issue 084 local evidence is ready, but GitHub CI cannot be recorded as passed until the branch is pushed and checks run.
findings.recommendation: Push the branch, open a pull request, wait for GitHub checks, and merge only if required gates pass.

unresolved_risks: GitHub PR CI evidence is pending.
